channel.title: Claude on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: What’s New in Microsoft Foundry | June 2026
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry’s June 2026 update adds Claude GA and several agent-related features released between Build 2026 and the end of June. It also calls out autopilot agents, expanded Toolboxes and Routines, and Agent Optimizer entering private preview.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: github: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub added support for organization and enterprise agents in JetBrains IDEs, along with Copilot CLI message queueing/steering and a new agent debug logs summary view. The update also previews Claude as an agent provider in JetBrains IDEs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.8 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.8 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed improved code understanding and generation compared with earlier models.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Rubber Duck in GitHub Copilot CLI now supports more models
item.description:
Rubber Duck in GitHub Copilot CLI now supports additional model combinations. It can use a Claude-powered critic agent in GPT sessions, with support also extended for Claude-based sessions.

  • Source: GitHub
